ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clay_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clay sample */,
  "lab_id" TEXT /* Lab ID of the sample */,
  "clay_number" TEXT /* Clay number */,
  "type_of_clay" TEXT /* Type of clay (e.g., marine, continental) */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State where the sample was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clay_samples_type_of_clay FOREIGN KEY ("type_of_clay") REFERENCES clay_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clay_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clay_samples_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES clay_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clay_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clay type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clay type (e.g., marine, continental) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clay type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clay type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clay type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
